title: Earlier Roadmap And PM-Cockpit History Demotion Execution
objective: Hard-demote the remaining earlier 2026-05-06 Olares Dev Residency roadmap and PM-cockpit decision/execution records so those records no longer read like live next-slice or operator guidance for the standalone repo boundary.
dependency_note: After Packet 183, the other remaining earlier 2026-05-06 non-gate branch is the roadmap and PM-cockpit decision/execution family: the roadmap-trigger realignment decision and execution records, the PM-cockpit authority-reference realignment decision and execution records, and the later cockpit state-sync and wording-hardening executions. Those records preserve already-closed branch evidence, but their titles and top sections still read like live next-slice or operator guidance instead of historical provenance.
execution_scope: Retitle the six targeted Olares Dev Residency handoffs as historical roadmap/PM-cockpit records and add explicit current-routing blocks.
Retitle the six targeted Olares Dev Residency packet JSON titles as historical records and add explicit historical-note and current-routing fields.
Preserve the decision, execution, and observed-state evidence as provenance rather than rewriting the historical records wholesale.
forbidden_scope: broad 2026-05-06 archive rewriting beyond top-entry demotion and routing context
host-workflow or workspace-authority history normalization in the same packet
success_criteria: Each targeted roadmap/PM-cockpit handoff now leads as a historical record instead of live next-slice guidance.
Each targeted packet JSON now carries explicit historical-note and current-routing context instead of reading like a still-live decision or execution definition.
Repo-owned status routing records the family closure and leaves any smaller adjacent residue for fresh reassessment afterward.
validation_commands: Select-String -Path ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-073-post-072-roadmap-trigger-realignment-decision-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-074-roadmap-trigger-realignment-execution-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-076-post-075-pm-operating-cockpit-and-authority-reference-realignment-decision-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-077-pm-operating-cockpit-and-authority-reference-realignment-execution-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-079-pm-cockpit-frontier-state-sync-execution-handoff.md,ops/agents/handoffs/2026-05-06-olares-dev-residency-081-pm-cockpit-durable-frontier-wording-execution-handoff.md -Pattern '^# Historical Olares Dev Residency','^Current routing:'
next_action: Run a fresh reassessment of any remaining earlier 2026-05-06 or adjacent packet-history surfaces that still read as current after the host-workflow/workspace-authority and roadmap/PM-cockpit branches are both closed.
